rows.label: tlk44510182_03_msg0001
rows.name:
Ah, ah[ML:Dash ]! Is this the return
of what the records described
from 500 years ago?

rows.label: tlk44510182_03_msg0002
rows.name:
Is this the end of the world[ML:Dash ]!?
No matter where we run,
it will be useless now.

rows.label: tlk44510182_03_msg0003
rows.name:
Then, for all its problems,
perhaps ending my days here
in my native Luxuria is fitting.

rows.label: tlk44510182_03_msg0004
rows.name:
I will meet that moment while
offering prayers to the technology
that served us to the very end.
